title: The Trail Ruins Overhaul
description: A datapack that overhauls trail ruins.
body:
# About the datapack:

### We're introducing: The Trail Ruins Overhaul﻿!

If you've ever explored Minecrafts trail ruins, you might have noticed they can look a bit weird and unappealing. But fear not! The Trail Ruins Overhaul datapack is here to change that. It gives these old structures a complete makeover, turning them into captivating medieval ruins that are much more visually appealing.

With the Trail Ruins Overhaul, you'll discover ruins that are filled with the charm and mystery of the Middle Ages. The walls and archways now have a weathered and grand appearance, as if they've stood for centuries. Intricate carvings and old vessels bring the ruins to life, hinting at the stories of the past.

Get ready, put on your adventurer's gear, and start an exciting journey. The Trail Ruins Overhaul invites you to experience the magic of ancient ruins transformed into medieval wonders.
